Nintendo Hardware

games

Hardware

Model Software version Memory Modded Other notes Colour
Original 11.17.0-50E 2GB SD N/A My original console Black
2DS XL 11.17.0-50E 32GB SD ✅ Luma3DS 13.2.1 Purchased second hand in New Zealand. Pikachu protection case. Given to my brother Owen. Black/Blue
2DS XL Pokeball 11.17.0-50E None N/A Purchased second hand in New Zealand. BROKEN - constantly presses "UP" - needs circle pad / D-pad fixed Red/White
New 3DS 11.17.0-50E 32GB SD ✅ Luma3DS 13.2.1 Purchased brand new in 2016. Battery replaced 10/12/2024 Black/wooden mario plates
New 3DS XL 11.17.0-50E 4GB SD N/A Purchased second hand in New Zealand. Battery replaced 10/12/2024 Black

3DS / DS Games

Unless stated otherwise consider these to be in mint condition with the box, guide etc:

  • Bravely Default
  • Bravely Second: End Layer
  • Animal Crossing: New Leaf
    • Box slightly damaged
  • Pokémon Black version
    • Victini Liberty Pass coupon still inside
  • Pokémon Black Version 2
  • Pokémon Soul Silver
    • Original cardboard box
    • Pokéwalker intact and in great condition.
    • Original guidebook
  • Pokémon Platinum
  • Pokémon Y
  • Pokémon Sun
  • Pokémon Moon
    • Cartridge only
  • Pokémon Alpha Sapphire
  • Pokémon Omega Ruby
  • Fire Emblem: Awakening
  • Professor Layton and the Azran Legacy
  • Fantasy Life
  • Tomodachi life
  • Monster hunter 4 ultimate
